contents: 引用的牛津大学论文下的一个网友评论：An important study. Thanks for the update. I apologize in advance for the digression, but please proof your work: "increased aggressive behaviour teen teenagers." "The study used representative sample of British 14 and 15-year olds and the same number of their careers..." I hope there's no link between playing violent video games and a decreased ability to write.
